shortDescription: Bright 2-bedroom condo in The Beaches with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 2125 Lake Shore Boulevard East, Unit 406 in the vibrant The Beaches neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
